get.description: Get transaction volume history data for a specific time interval

parameters.name: interval

schema.description: Time interval for the transaction volume data

parameters.description: Time interval for the transaction volume data

parameters.name: start_date

schema.description: Start date for the query (ISO format). If not provided, defaults based on interval.
schema.title: Start Date

parameters.description: Start date for the query (ISO format). If not provided, defaults based on interval.

parameters.name: end_date

schema.description: End date for the query (ISO format). If not provided, defaults to current time.
schema.title: End Date

parameters.description: End date for the query (ISO format). If not provided, defaults to current time.

200.description: Transaction volume history data retrieved successfully

500.description: An error occurred on the server while retrieving transaction volume history data

patch.summary: Complete Wallet Deactivation After Fee Payment
patch.description: Updates wallet status from DEACTIVATED_FEE_NOT_PAID to DEACTIVATED after fee payment.

parameters.name: tx_hash

schema.description: Transaction hash of the fee payment
schema.title: Tx Hash

parameters.description: Transaction hash of the fee payment

204.description: Successfully updated wallet status to DEACTIVATED (No content returned).

400.description: Invalid input data or wallet not in DEACTIVATED_FEE_NOT_PAID state.

404.description: Wallet not found.

500.description: An error occurred on the server while updating the wallet status.

get.description: Retrieve APR generated for a specific wallet

parameters.name: start_date

schema.description: ISO datetime to start APR calc, e.g. 2025-05-06T01:00:00+02:00
schema.title: Start Date

parameters.description: ISO datetime to start APR calc, e.g. 2025-05-06T01:00:00+02:00

parameters.name: end_date

schema.description: Optional end date for APR calculation
schema.title: End Date

parameters.description: Optional end date for APR calculation

parameters.name: use_exact_end_date

schema.description: If True, use end_date as the exact last performance point. If not provided, False is used.
schema.title: Use Exact End Date

parameters.description: If True, use end_date as the exact last performance point. If not provided, False is used.

400.description: Not enough historical data for APR calculation or wallet status = deactivated

404.description: Data not found for the wallet

500.description: An error occurred on the server while retrieving the wallet data

get.summary: Get Tokens For Target Apr Endpoint
get.description: Compute how many reward tokens are needed to reach target APR

parameters.name: token_price

schema.description: Price in USD of one reward token
schema.title: Token Price

parameters.description: Price in USD of one reward token

parameters.name: start_date

schema.description: Optional start date for APR calculation
schema.title: Start Date

parameters.description: Optional start date for APR calculation

parameters.name: end_date

schema.description: Optional end date for APR calculation
schema.title: End Date

parameters.description: Optional end date for APR calculation

parameters.name: use_exact_end_date

schema.description: If True, use end_date as the exact last performance point. If not provided, False is used.
schema.title: Use Exact End Date

parameters.description: If True, use end_date as the exact last performance point. If not provided, False is used.

400.description: Invalid parameters or insufficient APR data

404.description: Wallet not found

422.description: Invalid input data, e.g. token price must be greater than 0

500.description: Server error while calculating tokens

break_even_days.description: Number of days until APR improvement exceeds gas cost

total_capital.title: Total Capital
